Label: Demand a larger operating budget
Description: Ask the issuer for a +50 reward bump. Costs political capital, scaled by relationship.

Label: Negotiate a longer window
Description: Push the deadline; lower the contract's Risk by 5.

Label: Strip the constraints
Description: Remove visibility/oversight clauses; lower Exposure by 5.

Label: Push for hazard pay
Description: Lock a +100 reward bonus, but the issuer marks the job as priority — Risk goes up by 5.
